message:
refactor(commands): use dynamic socket path from rch_common

Replace hardcoded DEFAULT_SOCKET_PATH constant with default_socket_path()
function that delegates to rch_common::default_socket_path().

This enables the XDG_RUNTIME_DIR fallback chain:
1. $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/rch.sock (preferred on Linux with systemd)
2. ~/.cache/rch/rch.sock (cross-platform fallback)
3. /tmp/rch.sock (legacy default)

Affected commands:
- workers drain/enable/disable: socket existence checks
- daemon status: socket path display
- daemon start: socket path in responses and output

All socket path references now use the function call instead of the
constant, ensuring consistent behavior across CLI and daemon.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
